titleStmt.title: SII 22.449: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 449. (A.R. No. 449 of 1906) MADURAI DISTRICT, MADURAI TALUK, KĪḺAḌI near ŚILAIMĀṈ On the north, west and south walls of the central shrine in the Arjunēśvara temple Māṟavarmaṉ alias Tribhuvanachakravartin Kulaśēkharadēva, ‘who was pleased to take every country, year-30+1

summary.p: Sale of land to Kūttaṉ Teṉṉāḍaṉ alias Tribhuvanaśiṅgadēva of Kaṇṇaṉūr in Malai-maṇḍalam by the sabhā of Śrīkuntidēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya to the east of the tank at Vēlūr in Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu which was a dēvadāna of the temple of Muḍivaḻaṅgu-Pāṇḍya-Īśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, refers to the executive committee nirvvāhaka-sabhai of the village and to the 24th year (of the king's reign).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī meynittirumaṉ śrī komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakṛvattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekara devaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu karkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu 8 tiyati m Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum peṟṟa rohiṇi nāḷ Uṭaiyār muṭivaḻaṅku pāṇṭiya Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār devadāṉam madhurodayavaḷanāṭṭu velūṟ kuḷakkiḻ
bṛhmadeyam śrī kuntidevic caturvvedi maṅgalattu mahāsabhaiyom malaimaṇṭalattu kaṇṇaṉūr kūttaṉ teṉṉāṭaṉāṉa tribhuvaṉaciṅkatevaṟku nilavilaippuṉ pramāṇampaṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉnāḷ Ittevaṟku Irupattu nālāvatu nāḷil Ivvūril nirvvāhakasabhaip potuvil nikki nilaiyāṉa paṇattukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai
kālātāṅkaleṉṟu perkūṟappaṭṭa nilattukkum Īraṅkoḷḷi paṟṟukkum Āka Ippaṟṟukkaḷil vaṭakālā tāṅkalil viṟṟa nilattukkuc cūḻellaikkuk kiḻellai Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāna nāyaṉār tevatāṉattil melavarampukku meṟkum teṉṉellai tiyākañ ciriyāṉ kālil
paṟṟu Ūroṭu kiḻakku nokkip pona śrīvāykkālukkum Ippaṟṟu Uḷ ruṉūrkkup pokiṟa peruvarampukkum melpāl tiyākañciriyāṉ kālil vaṭakaraikku vaṭakkum melellai Ik kālil kiḻkaraikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Eṅkaḷ paṟṟūṭu Āḷuṭaiya piḷḷaiyār nāyaṉār tevatāṉakuḷat
�ykiṟakālil niṉṟum Ippaṟṟil kuḷattukku nirpāykiṟa kālil teṉkaraikkum Inta Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyār nāyaṉār tevatāṉattil teṉvarampukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāḷkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉceyyuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippun nattamun nattappālum Ippaṟṟil teṉpā
yil keriyum Īraṅkoḷḷip paṟṟukkuc cūḻellaikkuk kiḻellai Aṇṭa nāṭṭu veruṉūrppaṟṟil melellaikkum Ippaṟṟiṉ rumanāṇi paṟṟil melellaikku meṟkum teṉṉellai tiyākañ ciriyāṉ kālil vaṭakaraikku vaṭakkum melellai Ikkiḻkaraikkuk kiḻakku vaṭavellai Ippaṟṟukku nirpāykiṟa Araikkāy vāykkālukkum va
laikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉceyyum kuḷamuṅ kuḷaip parippum nattamum nattappālum Ippaṟṟukkaḷil kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷu meṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa prāptikaḷumuṭpaṭa Innilattukku muṉnāḷ nammur Uṭaiyār mucukuṇattiru virāmiccuramuṭaiya nāya
lekaṭamaikkuc celavākat tirunantāviḷakku Erittup potukaiyil Innāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi muṭṭu kaiyāl Intat tirunantāviḷakkut tavintuk kaṭamai Iṟuttu Uṇpārk kūṟṟa nilattukkup puṉ pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom kūttaṉ teṉṉāṭaṉāṉa tirupuvaṉaciṅkatevarkku mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuIncomplete
Digital edition of SII 22.449 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
